title: PII Routing Exception — Auto Loan Spike
description: During this morning's auto loan spike (127 members waiting, service level at 54%), one agent response combined member financials with public rate data. The routing trace shows all PII fields stayed in the SLM. Flagged for confirmation before the incident is closed.

confidence.rationale: Routing log and KAG tags agree on every field: 5 PII elements processed by the SLM, 0 reached the public LLM. Deterministic trace, no inference.

title: Token Cost Anomaly — Mortgage Servicing
description: LLM spend on the mortgage servicing persona is 41% above its 7-day average. Semantic cache hit rate dropped after a recent prompt change. Estimated overage of $180 this week if unaddressed.

confidence.rationale: Spend delta and cache-hit drop are direct gateway telemetry; the $180 projection extrapolates the current 7-day trajectory with ±15% variance.

title: Unexplained Agent Action — Quality Workflow
description: An agent on the quality workflow returned an insight with no policy citation attached. The observability panel is missing the chain-of-thought record for one turn. Needs a logging check.

confidence.rationale: Citation coverage is a direct count from the observability log; the single gap is confirmed present but the root cause (render vs. logging) requires the chain-of-thought check.
